initial_candidates.sql:
WITH team_swaps AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.first_round,
        d.last_round,
        d.constructor_id,
        LAG(cr.constructor_id) OVER (PARTITION BY d.driver_id, d.year ORDER BY r.round) AS prev_constructor_id,
        LEAD(cr.constructor_id) OVER (PARTITION BY d.driver_id, d.year ORDER BY r.round) AS next_constructor_id
    FROM drives d
    JOIN races r ON d.year = r.year AND d.first_round = r.round
    JOIN results res ON d.driver_id = res.driver_id AND d.year = res.race_id
    JOIN constructor_results cr ON res.race_id = cr.race_id
    WHERE d.last_round - d.first_round < 3
),
filtered_drives AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        driver_id,
        first_round,
        last_round
    FROM team_swaps
    WHERE prev_constructor_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND next_constructor_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND prev_constructor_id != next_constructor_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(first_round) AS avg_first_round_missed,
    AVG(last_round) AS avg_last_round_missed
FROM filtered_drives;

WITH missed_races AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.first_round,
        d.last_round,
        d.constructor_id AS before_constructor_id,
        cr_after.constructor_id AS after_constructor_id
    FROM drives d
    JOIN races r_before ON d.year = r_before.year AND d.first_round = r_before.round
    JOIN races r_after ON d.year = r_after.year AND (d.last_round + 1) = r_after.round
    JOIN results res_before ON res_before.race_id = r_before.race_id AND res_before.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructor_results cr_before ON cr_before.race_id = r_before.race_id AND cr_before.constructor_id = res_before.constructor_id
    JOIN results res_after ON res_after.race_id = r_after.race_id AND res_after.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructor_results cr_after ON cr_after.race_id = r_after.race_id AND cr_after.constructor_id = res_after.constructor_id
    WHERE (d.last_round - d.first_round + 1) < 3
      AND cr_before.constructor_id != cr_after.constructor_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(first_round) AS avg_first_round_missed,
    AVG(last_round) AS avg_last_round_missed
FROM missed_races;

WITH driver_missed_races AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.first_round,
        d.last_round,
        d.constructor_id AS current_constructor_id,
        LAG(d.constructor_id) OVER (PARTITION BY d.driver_id, d.year ORDER BY d.first_round) AS prev_constructor_id,
        LEAD(d.constructor_id) OVER (PARTITION BY d.driver_id, d.year ORDER BY d.last_round) AS next_constructor_id
    FROM drives d
    INNER JOIN races r ON d.year = r.year AND d.first_round = r.round
),
filtered_drivers AS (
    SELECT 
        driver_id,
        first_round,
        last_round
    FROM driver_missed_races
    WHERE (last_round - first_round + 1) < 3
      AND (
          (prev_constructor_id IS NOT NULL AND prev_constructor_id != current_constructor_id) 
          OR 
          (next_constructor_id IS NOT NULL AND next_constructor_id != current_constructor_id)
      )
)
SELECT 
    AVG(first_round) AS avg_first_round_missed,
    AVG(last_round) AS avg_last_round_missed
FROM filtered_drivers;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH missed_races AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        d.driver_id,
        d.first_round,
        d.last_round,
        d.constructor_id AS before_constructor_id,
        cr_after.constructor_id AS after_constructor_id
    FROM drives d
    JOIN races r_before ON d.year = r_before.year AND d.first_round = r_before.round
    JOIN races r_after ON d.year = r_after.year AND (d.last_round + 1) = r_after.round
    JOIN results res_before ON res_before.race_id = r_before.race_id AND res_before.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructor_results cr_before ON cr_before.race_id = r_before.race_id AND cr_before.constructor_id = res_before.constructor_id
    JOIN results res_after ON res_after.race_id = r_after.race_id AND res_after.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN constructor_results cr_after ON cr_after.race_id = r_after.race_id AND cr_after.constructor_id = res_after.constructor_id
    WHERE (d.last_round - d.first_round + 1) < 3
      AND cr_before.constructor_id != cr_after.constructor_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(first_round) AS avg_first_round_missed,
    AVG(last_round) AS avg_last_round_missed
FROM missed_races;
